ddls:
CREATE TABLE "parameters" (
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parameter */,
  "parameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the parameter (e.g., DC Brake Current Level) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the parameter */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Data type of the parameter (e.g., integer, float, boolean) */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the parameter (e.g., kg, degrees Celsius) */,
  "min_value" TEXT /* Minimum allowed value for the parameter */,
  "max_value" TEXT /* Maximum allowed value for the parameter */,
  "default_value" TEXT /* Default value for the parameter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parameter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parameter_settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each setting */,
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parameter the setting belongs to */,
  "machine_id" INTEGER /* ID of the machine the setting belongs to */,
  "setting_type" TEXT /* Type of setting (e.g., factory, customer) */,
  "setting_value" TEXT /* Value of the setting */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the setting was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the setting was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the setting */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the setting */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parameter_settings_parameter_id FOREIGN KEY ("parameter_id") REFERENCES parameters ("parameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parameter_settings_machine_id FOREIGN KEY ("machine_id") REFERENCES machines ("machine_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "machines" (
  "machine_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each machine */,
  "machine_name" TEXT /* Name of the machine */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the machine */,
  "machine_type" TEXT /* Type of machine (e.g., robotic arm, conveyor belt) */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the machine */,
  "model_number" TEXT /* Model number of the machine */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("machine_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "machine_parameters" (
  "machine_id" INTEGER /* ID of the machine */,
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parameter */,
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parameter setting for the machine */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the parameter is active for the machine */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("machine_id", "parameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_machine_parameters_setting_id FOREIGN KEY ("setting_id") REFERENCES parameter_settings ("setting_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, engineer) */,
  "password" TEXT /* User's password (hashed for security) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parameter_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parameter */,
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parameter setting for the version */,
  "machine_id" INTEGER /* ID of the machine the version belongs to */,
  "setting_value" TEXT /* Value of the parameter setting */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the version was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the version was last updated */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parameter_versions_machine_id FOREIGN KEY ("machine_id") REFERENCES machines ("machine_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parameter_versions_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parameter_versions_parameter_id FOREIGN KEY ("parameter_id") REFERENCES parameters ("parameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parameter_versions_setting_id FOREIGN KEY ("setting_id") REFERENCES parameter_settings ("setting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parameter_versions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
